data.title: Retail Traders Rush Into Leveraged Tech ETFs, Betting On Nasdaq Rebound After Sharp Drop
data.description: Retail traders bet big on tech rebound as Nasdaq 100 sees inflows of $4.44B & TQQQ becomes top choice for dip-buying. History shows 477% gains possible.

data.title: Palantir Stock Is On Fire This Week, Outpacing Broader Markets: What's Going On?
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:PLTR) shares are rising on Tuesday despite a pullback in broader markets. The stock appears to be moving on continued momentum after the company announced that NATO acquired one of its AI-powered military systems.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Dip, But Traders Remain Optimistic For One Reason
data.description: Major cryptocurrencies are in the red as macro uncertainty and trade war tensions weigh on sentiment.

data.title: LinkedIn Co-Founder Reid Hoffman Says Building A Startup Means Embracing The 'Pain'—And The 100 Early Employees Who No Longer Work Prove It
What's Going On With American Airlines Stock Today?
data.description: American Airlines stock rises as it announces free inflight Wi-Fi for AAdvantage members through a new partnership with AT&T.
